'''bayuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nock|nock]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-y-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nock|nock]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| bayuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæyiwith|bæyiwith]] || [[word:bæyiwij|bæyiwij]] || [[word:bæyiwish|bæyiwish]] || [[word:bæyiwi|bæyiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bayuyuwuth|bayuyuwuth]] || [[word:bayuyuwuj|bayuyuwuj]] || [[word:bayuyuwush|bayuyuwush]] || [[word:bayuyuwu|bayuyuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bayuwuth|bayuwuth]] || [[word:bayuwuj|bayuwuj]] || [[word:bayuwush|bayuwush]] || [[word:bayuwu|bayuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bayufwuth|bayufwuth]] || [[word:bayufwuj|bayufwuj]] || [[word:bayufwush|bayufwush]] || [[word:bayufwuf|bayufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bayuwuthu|bayuwuthu]] || [[word:bayuwuju|bayuwuju]] || [[word:bayuwushu|bayuwushu]] || [[word:bayuwuku|bayuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bayuwuth|bayuwuth]] || [[word:bayuwuj|bayuwuj]] || [[word:bayuwush|bayuwush]] || [[word:bayuwu|bayuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bayuwuthul|bayuwuthul]] || [[word:bayuwujul|bayuwujul]] || [[word:bayuwushul|bayuwushul]] || [[word:bayuwukul|bayuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bayuwuthuthu|bayuwuthuthu]] || [[word:bayuwujuju|bayuwujuju]] || [[word:bayuwushushu|bayuwushushu]] || [[word:bayuwuku|bayuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bayuwuthun|bayuwuthun]] || [[word:bayuwujun|bayuwujun]] || [[word:bayuwushun|bayuwushun]] || [[word:bayuwukun|bayuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bayuwuthuoro|bayuwuthuoro]] || [[word:bayuwujuoro|bayuwujuoro]] || [[word:bayuwushuoro|bayuwushuoro]] || [[word:bayuwukuoro|bayuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
